intro: Chamaemelum alpinum, also known as Alpine Chamomile or False Chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to mountainous regions of Europe. The health benefits of Chamaemelum alpinum include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative properties, which make it useful for soothing digestive issues, calming restlessness and insomnia, and reducing anxiety. The bioactive constituents of this plant include apigenin, luteolin, and chamazulene, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Chamaemelum alpinum is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
